match.userMessage:
9-panel cinematic storyboard sheet derived from Image 1. Mix Wide, Medium, and Tight shots of the same scene. No borders between panels.

Layout: 3x3 grid (9 panels) in a 16:9 landscape image.

Scene: Modern social-first product photography with natural cinematic realism, SCARLETT wearing casual light-colored top with high-waisted linen shorts captured mid-stride walking toward the beach along the oceanfront promenade, one hand brushing the low stone wall with forward momentum and potential energy, distant surfers paddling on boards visible across the rolling ocean waves, highly detailed coastal environment showing textured promenade path, weathered low wall and open sea horizon under clear morning sky with ocean blues and sand tones, bright natural daylight casting clean directional shadows and high-key airy illumination with crisp highlights and lifted shadows, eye-level camera angle using 35mm lens and shallow depth of field to keep the subject pin-sharp while softly blurring the background ocean and figures.

Match Image 1 exactly: same character(s) (face, hair, skin, clothing), lighting, color grade, and texture. If character reference sheets are provided, use them for likeness — do not render them as separate panels.

No text, dialogue bubbles, scene numbers, or watermarks.


  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [PRIMARY SOURCE]: Primary source scene — generate 9 variant shots from this image
    - Image 2 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 3 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. PROMENADE - MORNING - Oceanfront promenade with low wall leading toward the beach
    
    IMPORTANT: Character, location, and element reference images are for IDENTITY CONSISTENCY ONLY. Do NOT reproduce them as separate panels or subjects. Elements (logos, products) must render faithfully when referenced but should appear naturally within the scene. All output panels must depict the scene from the PRIMARY SOURCE image.
  </reference-images>
